messages.content: chatgpt.esparks.cn

Lo siento, soy un modelo de lenguaje y no puedo acceder a sitios web específicos como chatgpt.esparks.cn. Sin embargo, estaré encantado de ayudarte con cualquier pregunta o conversación que tengas aquí. ¿En qué puedo ayudarte?

请帮我翻译成英文：
我曾在安踏担任营销经理
I used to work as a marketing manager at ANTA.
请帮我翻译成英文：主要负责 品牌推广营销活动、视觉物料输出、
I was mainly responsible for brand promotion, marketing campaigns, and visual material production at ANTA.
请帮我翻译成英文：：在这之前的五年时间都在广告公司工作
I had worked in an advertising company for the past five years before that.
请帮我翻译成英文：跨部门协作、物料把控的技能
Skills in cross-department collaboration and material management control.
请帮我翻译成英文：团队协作、项目统筹、落地执行 能力
Ability in teamwork, project coordination, and execution.
翻译英文：在电子烟行业
In the electronic cigarette industry.

翻译英文：我的优点是问题的拆解能力
拿到问题的第一步是拆解，大问题拆解成若干个小议题，逐个击破。我能力范围内的可以自己解决，需要领导协助的就向上求助支援。当一个个小问题都被解决之后，大问题就不存在了。

My strength lies in my ability to break down problems. The first step in tackling a problem is to break it down into several smaller issues and tackle them one by one. I can handle the ones within my capabilities on my own, and for those that require assistance, I seek support from my superiors. Once all the smaller problems are resolved, the larger problem ceases to exist.
翻译英文：产品售罄率达到103%
The product sell-out rate has reached 103%.
翻译英文：需要去权衡各方利益，做流量的倾斜，项目的安排
It is necessary to balance the interests of all parties and make adjustments for traffic distribution and project planning.
翻译英文：项目统筹，联名安东尼推出合作款，和明星在社媒发声粉丝互动，线上线下根据销售额实时复盘

Project coordination, launching collaborative products with Antony, engaging with fans through social media endorsements by celebrities, and conducting real-time analysis based on sales performance both online and offline.
